description_long: This bungalow complex features multiple single-story wooden structures with pitched, shingled roofs arranged on a rectangular grassy plot. The main building is centrally located and flanked by several smaller outbuildings, all sharing a cohesive architectural style. A rectangular swimming pool is situated adjacent to the main house, adding a recreational element to the property. Wide porches with visible railings are present on several buildings, enhancing the outdoor living space. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes facing the central courtyard. The overall design suggests a Craftsman or Ranch influence, with an emphasis on natural materials and open, communal spaces.
description: A multi-structure bungalow complex with pitched shingle roofs, wooden exteriors, wide porches, and a central swimming pool on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow with a prominent porch, central pool, and aligned outbuildings on a grassy plot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building, the pool's position, and the arrangement of outbuildings to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porches and the alignment of all structures along the plot's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, pool, and the spatial relationship between all outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
